title: Rebalanced Anvils
description: Improves mid-to-end-game Vanilla progression and enchanting with anvils!
body:
Anvils have been known for making enchantment tables nearly obselete though stealing all of your experience levels.

This mod aims to rebalance anvils through an otherwise untouched resource, Amethyst Shards. While amethyst clusters are typically ignored in the average playthrough, this mod gives players a good reason to explore the caves and the Geodes. While leaving your experience points available to be used by your enchanting table.

This mod also removes the "too expensive" anvil cap, now the most expensive items will take a maximum of 20 Amethyst Shards. Any further enchantments/repairs will still cost 20 Shards.
